jp.title: キーウやウクライナ各地で市民がフェドロウ国防相解任に抗議集会開催
jp.description: １６日、キーウ中心部のイヴァン・フランコ広場で、市民がミハイロ・フェドロウ国防相の解任への抗議を表明する集会を開催している。 — ウクルインフォルム.

jp.title: ロシアとウクライナ、黒海・アゾフ海で船舶攻撃 小麦価格急騰
jp.description: ウクライナとロシアは１６日、黒海とアゾフ海の船舶に対してミサイルとドローン（無人機）による攻撃を実施し、戦闘が激化した。両海域は穀物輸出に極めて重要な地域で、攻撃を受けて世界の小麦​価格が上昇している。

jp.title: 【巨人】ヤクルトにセ最多18度目逆転勝ちで連勝！首位と1差ピタリ 笹原2号決勝2ラン 赤星が2死満塁凌ぎ5勝目 マタ6回途中1失点
jp.description:

巨人はヤクルトにリーグ最多18度目の逆転勝ちで連勝。2カード連続の勝ち越しを決め44勝37敗2分の貯金7。また首位・阪神が中日に勝利したためゲ

jp.title: ヘグセス氏、米軍でテストステロン欠乏症の検査を開始すると発言
jp.description: 米国防総省のヘグセス長官は15日、30歳以上の軍人を対象に、毎年の健康診断の一環としてテストステロン欠乏症の検査を実施すると発表した。テストステロン値が低い兵士には、任意でホルモン補充療法が提供されるという。

jp.title: 日産、新型「エルグランド」発売記念イベントを開催 なぜ走りにこだわるのか、なぜe-4ORCE仕様だけの設定なのか？
jp.description: 日産自動車は7月16日、同日に発売した新型「エルグランド」の発売記念イベントを日産グローバル本社ギャラリー（神奈川県横浜市西区）で開催した。

world.title: Call for ban on disposable barbecues amid hot weather
world.description: The Social Democrats are calling for a ban on the sale of disposable barbecues, saying the Government's recommendation for shops not to sell them falls short of what is needed.

world.title: US launches new attacks on Iran as Tehran targets Gulf sites
world.description: Iran’s Health Ministry has said at least 35 people have been killed and more than 300 injured since fighting resumed.

world.title: Canada Aligns With Brazil, China, Tanzania and Other Key Markets as Brussels Airport Ignites a Global Travel Surge With Rising Passenger Traffic, New International Routes and Powerful Aviation Growth
world.description: Canada is strengthening its travel connection with Brazil, China, Tanzania and other key global markets as Brussels Airport records powerful aviation growth in 2026, driven by rising passenger demand, expanded international routes and stronger worldwide connectivity.

world.title: Pour One Out for Physical Media With a Library of Drool-Worthy Golden-Era Game Box Art
world.description: The Big Box Collection is a throwback to an era when games' packaging and artwork was an art in itself.

world.title: Bali Tourists Urged To Prioritize Safety After Dark
world.description: Tourists in Bali are being called to prioritise safety, especially in top tourism destinations late at night.

world.title: IABC Africa Partners with AU, AUDA-NEPAD for 2026 Communications Conference
world.description: Cape Town, South Africa | JULIUS BUSINGE & AGENCIES | The International Association of Business Communicators Africa Region (IABC Africa) has partnered with the African Union (AU) and the African Union Development Agency (AUDA-NEPAD) for the 2026 IABC Africa Conference, strengthening efforts to advance Africa’s development agenda through strategic communication. world.title: Ella Langley, Olivia Dean Dominate Luminate Mid-Year 2026 Songs Chart
world.description: Ella Langley and Olivia Dean both have two top 10 songs while Spanish-language music soars to 1 in 10 U.S. streams, per Luminate's mid-year report.

world.title: Ebola spreading in DRC 'faster than any earlier outbreak'
world.description: The World Health Organization has warned that Ebola is spreading in the Democratic Republic of Congo at a faster pace than during any previous outbreak of the deadly virus.

world.title: Victor Osimhen: Galatasaray unveil fresh plans for Super Eagles star amid Atletico Madrid links
world.description: Super Eagles striker Victor Osimhen is set to enjoy new perks at Galatasaray ahead of the start of the 2026/27 season, Soccernet.ng reports.
